base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of spell_fireball_flame_pillar — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1986 dragon quest. Dragon breath / Fireball spell. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 6-frame orange-red fire-pillar — Dragon breath / Fireball spell; starts small at base, grows into tall flame wall, crests and dissipates. 2nd row adds mid-tier pillars
